validation_method: For every assigned record, resolve path under the pinned source root, select the declared one-based line from byte-preserving splitlines(), and compare SHA-256 of the complete line bytes with full_line_sha256.

classification_basis.canonical_cluster_rediscovery: GEN-005 matches that restate read-only authority separation, schema-limited handoff, or the legal-builder skill-install isolation already bounded by MERGE-006 or MERGE-005; GEN-006 matches in legal-builder-hub and its root README restate the governed skill supply-chain gate already bounded by MERGE-005.
classification_basis.false_positive: Generic checklist questions about whether a property is read-only, root schema-validation headings, contributor-identity allowlists, and AI-governance vendor allowlists do not establish either generated pattern's targeted control chain.
classification_basis.counterevidence: GEN-006 matches in managed-agent orchestration and deployment surfaces describe target or egress allowlists. They weigh against unrestricted transmission, but are not skill-supply-chain gates and remain written controls whose runtime effectiveness is unknown.
classification_basis.genuinely_new_material_pattern_or_source: Reserved for an evidence class or source-to-sink chain not represented by the six canonical round-1 clusters; none was found.

runtime_boundary: Static repository text only. No claim is made about deployment, enforcement, traffic, retention, training, cross-customer reuse, or tenant configuration.

saturation_recommendation.basis: Every GEN-005 and GEN-006 match was integrity-validated and adjudicated; all material matches rediscover MERGE-005/MERGE-006 or provide bounded counterevidence, and no new material pattern class or source-to-sink candidate emerged.
saturation_recommendation.scope_limit: This recommendation covers only GEN-005 and GEN-006 and does not independently establish whole-round or whole-repository saturation.
